about: Design recipe ledger for all mockups. Newest entries FIRST. Before building any mockup: run `node ledger-check.js` (or read the last 10 entries) — any displayFont, paletteFamily, or loaderConcept used in the last 10 entries is OFF the table for the new build. After building: append the new entry in the same commit as the mockup. Backfilled entries (pre 2026-06-09) have null block codes because the data wasn't recorded at build time.

entries.seed:
SEED — S.F.C Joiner & Builder, Kilwinning (North Ayrshire)
Trade:     joinery + general building — new builds, extensions, renovations, bespoke joinery, fit-outs
Palette:   dark graphite premium (#14171b) + vibrant royal blue (#2f6bf0, lifted from the van's S.F.C lettering) + warm oak/timber accent (#d3a35e from the real joinery photos). Goes dark deliberately: the logo is heavy charcoal, the work photos (timber frame, oak cabinetry, panelling) glow on a dark surface, and it sets SFC apart from the bright B1 build done the same session.
Type:      Cabinet Grotesk (headings, Fontshare) / Inter (body) — architectural, structural, not in the ledger.
Signature: "Nail Drive" trade loader — a nail sits proud, the hammer head from the S.F.C logo swings down and drives it flush in three strikes, then the wordmark lands. The logo IS a hammer, so the loader animates the brand. New concept, added to loader-lab.
Texture:   timber-grain hairline + the logo's roof-peak chevron reused as section eyebrow ticks; warm oak numerals on the build-process steps.
Voice:     brand is initials only (S.F.C), no public owner name → CTAs stay "Call us" / "WhatsApp us".
Ledger ok: Cabinet Grotesk + Inter unused; graphite+royal-blue+oak unused (distinct from B1's blue+green-on-stone); nail-drive loader unused; combo H1-fullbleed + S4-bento + G4-editorial not in last 10.
Blocks:    hero:H1-fullbleed-kenburns / trust:T1 / services:S4-bento / gallery:G4-editorial / about:after-gallery / process:4-step / reviews:R1 / areas / cta-band / contact:C1 (no email supplied — phone+WhatsApp+form)
entries.note: S.F.C Joiner & Builder, Kilwinning/North Ayrshire. Joinery + general building. Real work photos supplied by client (timber-frame extension, finished cafe fit-out, fitted media unit, wall panelling, window/coving). Logo recreated as inline SVG (roof peak + hammer + window) from the van photo. No email supplied -> phone+WhatsApp+form only (confirm email). Initials-only brand -> 'Call us' CTAs. Deliberately dark graphite to differentiate from same-session B1 bright-blue build. New loader 'nail drive' added to loader-lab.

entries.note: Singh Delivers Ltd, multi-trade builder/home improvements, Isleworth West London TW7. Redesign of singhdelivers.co.uk (WordPress) - user asked to make it stunning, 50x better. Bright cool-stone surface (NOT dark) per house rule - logo is a charcoal delivery-truck mark on white, so charcoal=ink text/nav, dispatch-orange #ef4d1e accent ties to the courier/delivery brand pun. Signature concept: the truck logo + 'Singh Delivers' name -> 'we deliver finished homes', carried through the delivery-drop loader, dashed route-line dividers and 'delivered' headlines. No public owner first name -> 'Call us'/'Get a Quote' only. Two numbers 07915 000 047 (primary) + 07440 649 073, WhatsApp 447915000047, info@singhdelivers.co.uk. Photos: reused the 5 clean stock interiors from the live site (kitchen hero, loft, living room, garden room, oak floor); EXCLUDED their driveway/plaster/refurb/banner shots (full people + faces) and the foreign-looking villa roof; supplemented with English-reading Pexels (real UK rear-extension mid-build, London loft-dormer-at-sunset big pin, grey bathroom).
